data.title: Introducing SproutLake AI Anomaly Detection
data.description: Don't Just Monitor. Understand. We turn raw sensor data into expert advice, protecting your most valuable assets when it matters most.
data.content:
Don't Just Monitor. Understand.

Introducing SproutLake AI Anomaly Detection, powered by Senti AI. We turn raw sensor data into expert advice, protecting your most valuable assets when it matters most.

A single missed health event during farrowing can cost over $400 in potential revenue. Early detection is everything.

The Silent Problem in the Crate

A sow's water consumption is a vital sign. Deviations are often the first and only indicator of a problem.

  • Critical Low (< 0.5 L/hr): A major red flag for illness, pain, or a blocked water nipple. Requires immediate action.
  • Healthy Range (0.8-1.5 L/hr): Consistent consumption indicates a healthy, comfortable, and productive sow.
  • Warning High (> 3.0 L/hr): A potential sign of fever, mastitis, or infection. Requires investigation.

The AI Difference: From Sensor to Solution

Our system goes beyond simple thresholds. We use AI to analyze patterns and provide expert-level reasoning:

  1. Collect Data — Sensors monitor water flow 24/7.
  2. Stream to Platform — Data is sent to the secure SproutLake cloud.
  3. AI Analysis — SproutLake AI analyzes data against health models.
  4. Get Actionable Alerts — Receive expert advice on your device.

The SproutLake AI Advantage

  • Reduce Piglet Mortality
  • Lower Vet Costs
  • Improve Animal Welfare
  • Gain Peace of Mind
